title: rubus × frivolus
intro: Rubus × frivolus, a hybrid plant, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant content, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × frivolus include the potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
